positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a cosmic fox spirit (kitsune) standing gracefully among abstract constellations and glowing geometric floral patterns. The fox has a majestic, flowing tail composed of nebula dust and stellar colors (deep blues, purples, cyan). The composition is centered and balanced, featuring strong silhouettes against a dark, ethereal background. Use clean linework, flat vector-style coloring mixed with ethereal glow effects (glowoir style), high contrast, and perfect symmetry. Focus on negative space for print clarity. Trending on ArtStation, graphic novel quality, vector illustration, celestial themes.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, noise, grainy, realistic photo, signature, copyright
